title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - April 25, 2023
section_path: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - April 25, 2023
section_path_text: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Dry Bulk Report - April 25, 2023
summary:
Main
•Volatility declines as a wait-and-see approach takes center stage - The dry bulk market rarely stands still, as by nature it is flooded with volatility, twists and turns, and a highly unpredictable spot market. Yet, the last several weeks have been unusually calm as spot rates have traded in a rather tight range. Both basins demonstrate signs of balance, and although demand for transportation has been gradually increasing with higher indicated iron ore exports from both Brazil and Australia, there have been sufficient ships open to absorb such volumes without any meangiful impact on pricing.
